content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 — Incentivized review copy in paywall UI WARN — PaywallView.swift:12 offers "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!" — a direct quid-pro-quo review incentive.
Pierre: Apple prohibits offering compensation (including free premium time) in exchange for reviews or specifically for high star ratings under guideline 2.3.9. This paywall string ties a "5-star review" to a tangible reward, which is exactly the kind of rating manipulation reviewers reject. Remove the reward-for-review offer and use the system `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview` API without conditioning it on rating value or reward.
